title: Buttery Flatbread
description: A simple flatbread recipe with a rich, buttery flavor, perfect for serving with your favorite curries or as a side dish.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Brush the flatbread with olive oil on both sides.
Place the flatbread in the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until lightly toasted.
Brush the buttery mixture on top of the flatbread while it's still warm.
